pages.text: Materials grant traits to specific tools and armor $(l)for free$() — no modifier slots spent. Iron pickaxes magnetize drops; slime boots bounce; blaze armor shrugs off fire.$(br2)Every material's entry in this chapter lists its grants.
pages.title: Traits

pages.text: Mixing specific materials in one tool unlocks bonus modifiers at no cost:$(br2)- $(l)Galvanic$() — iron + copper$(br)- $(l)Gilded$() — iron + gold$(br)- $(l)Verdant Veil$() — copper + gold$(br2)Experiment with mixed-material builds.
pages.title: Synergies
